languages.text: {n}Гневные вены вздуваются на лбу {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}манипулуса{/g}.{/n} "Единственное, что она покажет — вашу непригодность к занимаемой должности, Ферренц. Ваша ложь не обманет {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Гневные вены вздуваются на лбу {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}манипулуса{/g}.{/n} "Единственное, что она покажет — вашу непригодность к занимаемой должности, Ферренц. Ваша ложь не обманет {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольного Торговца{/g}".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}Angry veins swell on the {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s forehead.{/n} "The only thing it will show is your unfitness for your post, Ferrenz. Your lies will not fool the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

languages.text: {n}Unas venas furiosas se hinchan en la frente del {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g}.{/n} «Lo único que dejará claro es que no merece su puesto, Ferrenz. Sus mentiras no engañarán a{mf|l| la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}».
languages.original_text: {n}Angry veins swell on the {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s forehead.{/n} "The only thing it will show is your unfitness for your post, Ferrenz. Your lies will not fool the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Unas venas furiosas se hinchan en la frente del {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g}.{/n} «Lo único que dejará claro es que no merece su puesto, Ferrenz. Sus mentiras no engañarán a{mf|l| la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}».

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}额头青筋暴起。{/n}“它唯一能输出的结论，就是你根本无法胜任当前职能，费伦茨。你那错漏百出的谎言，蒙蔽不了{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}的逻辑认知。”
languages.original_text: {n}Angry veins swell on the {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s forehead.{/n} "The only thing it will show is your unfitness for your post, Ferrenz. Your lies will not fool the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}额头青筋暴起。{/n}“它唯一能输出的结论，就是你根本无法胜任当前职能，费伦茨。你那错漏百出的谎言，蒙蔽不了{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}的逻辑认知。”

languages.text: {n}Des veines palpitent sur le front du {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} en colère.{/n} « La seule chose que cette démonstration va prouver, Ferrenz, c'est que vous êtes indigne de votre poste. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande}{/g} ne se laissera pas duper par vos mensonges. »
languages.original_text: {n}Angry veins swell on the {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s forehead.{/n} "The only thing it will show is your unfitness for your post, Ferrenz. Your lies will not fool the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Des veines palpitent sur le front du {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} en colère.{/n} « La seule chose que cette démonstration va prouver, Ferrenz, c'est que vous êtes indigne de votre poste. {mf|Le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g}|La libre-marchande} ne se laissera pas duper par vos mensonges. »

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus'un{/g} alnında öfkeden damarlar beliriyor.{/n} "Göstereceğin tek şey, bu göreve uygun olmadığın olacak Ferrenz. Yalanlarınla {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir'i{/g} kandıramayacaksın."
languages.original_text: {n}Angry veins swell on the {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s forehead.{/n} "The only thing it will show is your unfitness for your post, Ferrenz. Your lies will not fool the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus'un{/g} alnında öfkeden damarlar beliriyor.{/n} "Göstereceğin tek şey, bu göreve uygun olmadığın olacak Ferrenz. Yalanlarınla {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir'i{/g} kandıramayacaksın."

languages.text: {n}Auf der Stirn des {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} bilden sich Zornesfalten.{/n} "Sie wird nur verdeutlichen, wie ungeeignet Ihr für Euren Posten seid, Ferrenz. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin}{/g} wird auf Eure Lügen nicht hereinfallen."
languages.original_text: {n}Angry veins swell on the {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s forehead.{/n} "The only thing it will show is your unfitness for your post, Ferrenz. Your lies will not fool the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}."

languages.text: {n}マニピュラスの額に怒りの血管が浮き出る。{/n}"それが示すのは、お前がそのポストにふさわしくないということだけだ、フェレンツ。お前の嘘はローグ・トレーダーを欺くことはできない"
